answers.contents:
就问一句 小米裁了多少人？
紫薯紫薯紫薯紫薯紫薯紫薯紫薯
小米抢走了华为的高端手机生意，小心被别有用心的人举报间谍、汉奸、美帝良心企业等等。

https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/1810.HK?.tsrc=applewf

我秒了一下股票表现 完全不像你说的这样 我看投资人不会被这种PR忽悠

Chinese smartphone maker Xiaomi Corp (1810.HK) reported a 4% revenue drop in the second quarter, tracking a shrinkage in China's handset market, but said its move into making electric vehicles was running ahead of schedule.

Sales dropped to 67.4 billion yuan ($9.2 billion) from 70.17 billion in the same quarter a year earlier, but beating analysts' estimates of 65.13 billion.

Net income rose to 5.14 billion yuan over the period, an increase of 147% from 2.08 billion yuan a year earlier, also beating expectations. The company put the increase down to cost cutting and efficiency improvements, particularly in its physical stores.

营收同比是下降的，整体艰难，但还算是好于预期。开源就是造ev（计划，计划。我是不相信雷军还会投资，特别是注定团灭的国产电瓶车领域），节流当然就是裁员关店。一切为了报表。
支那今年的新手机，新系统，已经全面接入反诈了
